case_title: THE GRANADA, INC. vs. DICKOUGH, KEN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DICKOUGH, KEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: THE GRANADA, 1000 SUTTER ST, ROOM 502, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL FEB-16-1994, AT 12:00 NOON. THE SHERIFF MAY POST NOTICE OF THE EXECUTION OF THE WRIT OF POSSESION BEFORE THAT DATE. THEREA ARE NO MONEY DAMAGES. THE PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS, AND ATTORNEY'S FEES.
